note: Top-level files and directories at the repo root. Descriptions are grounded in current repo reality, not the older bundle.

entries.name: .env.example
entries.description: example environment file for local dev (never loaded in tests)

entries.name: .gitignore
entries.description: git ignore rules for the repo

entries.name: AGENT.md
entries.description: operational memory index for agent-style development

entries.name: NOTICE
entries.description: NOTICE file for the Apache 2.0 distribution

entries.name: README.md
entries.description: project readme (what VoxeraOS is, quick start, architecture)

entries.name: docs
entries.description: architecture, ops, security, roadmap, and this index bundle

entries.name: missions
entries.description: file-based mission templates (JSON/YAML loaded at runtime)

entries.name: pyproject.toml
entries.description: project metadata and Python tooling config (ruff/pytest/build)

entries.name: scripts
entries.description: helper scripts (e2e smoke scripts, mypy ratchet, update)

entries.name: systemd
entries.description: legacy top-level systemd units kept for reference
